query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "mobileforge: annotation-free adaptation for mobile gui agents with hie" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it is a foundational empirical study on the specific domain of "Mobile GUI Agents," establishing the current state-of-the-art benchmarks (AndroidWorld, AndroidLab) and methodologies (verifier-driven approaches) that any follow-up research on extending or adapting these agents must cite. It satisfies criteria (c) as an empirical baseline and (d) as a canonical reference for the specific sub-field of mobile GUI automation agents.
